scrape-cycle.task: Run the scrape cycle: first check daily spend via spend-tracker, then scrape all sources using pokemon-scraper skill, analyze new listings with card-analyzer skill, and alert on deals via deal-alerts skill. If spend is over 80% of cap, only scrape watchlist cards.

outreach-cycle.task: Run the daily outreach cycle: check daily spend, then email all eligible contacts using email-outreach skill, then call eligible contacts using voice-outreach skill. Respect all cooldowns and daily limits from config.

daily-summary.task: Compile and send the daily summary via deal-alerts skill. Include: total cards scanned, deals found, best deal, outreach activity, API spend breakdown, and projected monthly cost.

database-backup.task: Run database backup by executing: node tools/backup-db.js

cloud-sync.task: Sync local data to cloud CRM by executing: node tools/sync/cloudSync.js
